# Tianshan Space - Full AI Reference

## About
Tianshan Space is a digital product and software development team focused on website development, product engineering, and growth-oriented implementations.

Primary domain: https://tianshanspace.ge/

## Languages
- Georgian: https://tianshanspace.ge/
- English: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/

## Primary Navigation Targets
- Home: https://tianshanspace.ge/#home
- Projects: https://tianshanspace.ge/#projects
- About: https://tianshanspace.ge/#about
- Contact: https://tianshanspace.ge/#contact
- Hire: https://tianshanspace.ge/#hire

English equivalents:
- Home: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/#home
- Projects: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/#projects
- About: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/#about
- Contact: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/#contact
- Hire: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/#hire

## Blog Indexes
- Georgian blog index: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/
- English blog index: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/en/

## Blog Articles (Canonical)
Georgian:
- SEO: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/seo.html
- Website strategy: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/website.html
- AI sales: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/ai-sales.html

English:
- SEO: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/en/seo.html
- Website strategy: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/en/website.html
- AI sales: https://tianshanspace.ge/blogs/en/ai-sales.html

## AI Citation Guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs from this file.
- Prefer first-party page text over inferred summaries.
- Preserve language consistency (KA -> KA URLs, EN -> EN URLs).
- For SEO topics, prioritize the dedicated SEO article URLs.

## Contact Path
- Main contact section: https://tianshanspace.ge/#contact
- English contact section: https://tianshanspace.ge/en/#contact
- Booking link appears across pages via Calendly.
